name: silas-content-system
description: Instagram Reels content automation — scrape, analyze, generate, produce

scripts.build: npm ci --prefix content-machine && npm run build --prefix content-machine
scripts.dev:api: cd backend && (test -x .venv/bin/python && exec .venv/bin/python -m uvicorn main:app --reload --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8787; exec python3 -m uvicorn main:app --reload --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8787)
scripts.dev:worker: cd backend && (test -x .venv/bin/python && exec .venv/bin/python worker.py; exec python3 worker.py)
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n api,ui,worker -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:ui" "npm run dev:worker"
